description: Fix five structural root causes of recurring workflow failures: shared task completion type, inference quality gate, agent session lifecycle, pre-flight dispatch check, stale model pruning.

phases.name: Shared TaskCompletionBody in hex-core
phases.description: Add TaskCompletionBody + TaskStatus to hex-core/src/types/. Update hex-agent task_executor.rs and stdb_task_poller.rs to use the shared type. Update hex-nexus swarms route handler to deserialize the same type.

tasks.name: Add TaskCompletionBody to hex-core
tasks.description:
Create hex-core/src/types/task_completion.rs with:
```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, serde::Serialize, serde::Deserialize)]
pub struct TaskCompletionBody {
    pub task_id: String,
    pub status: TaskStatus,
    pub result: Option<String>,
    pub error: Option<String>,
    pub agent_id: Option<String>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, serde::Serialize, serde::Deserialize)]
#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
pub enum TaskStatus {
    Pending,
    InProgress,
    Completed,
    Failed,
}
```
Export from hex-core/src/lib.rs as `pub mod types; pub use types::task_completion::{TaskCompletionBody, TaskStatus};`
tasks.done_condition: hex-core exports TaskCompletionBody and TaskStatus; cargo check passes

tasks.name: Update hex-agent and hex-nexus to use shared type
tasks.description: In hex-agent/src/adapters/secondary/task_executor.rs and stdb_task_poller.rs: replace any inline TaskStatus or completion body structs with `use hex_core::{TaskCompletionBody, TaskStatus}`. In hex-nexus/src/routes/swarms.rs: replace inline task completion deserialization with `use hex_core::TaskCompletionBody`.
tasks.done_condition: All three files use hex_core::{TaskCompletionBody, TaskStatus}; cargo check workspace passes

phases.name: Inference quality gate on registration
phases.description: In hex-cli inference add command: after persisting provider, call inference_test internally. If response is empty or HTTP error, delete the record and return an error. Add --prune flag to hex inference discover that removes all registered providers returning empty.

tasks.name: Add quality gate to inference add + --prune to discover
tasks.description:
In hex-cli/src/commands/inference.rs:
1. In the `add` subcommand handler: after successfully persisting the provider via POST /api/inference/providers, immediately call GET /api/inference/test/{id}. If the test returns empty content or HTTP error, call DELETE /api/inference/providers/{id} and return an error: `Error: provider '{id}' registered but returned empty response — removed. Check model ID.`
2. In the `discover` subcommand: add `--prune` flag. When set, after discovering providers, for each existing registered provider, call GET /api/inference/test/{id}. Remove any that return empty content.
tasks.done_condition: hex inference add with bad model ID fails with clear error; --prune flag exists on discover

phases.name: Agent session lifecycle — disconnect on session-end
phases.description: Add POST /api/hex-agents/:id/disconnect route to hex-nexus that sets endedAt=now, status=completed. Wire into hook-handler for session-end event: call hex agent disconnect $CLAUDE_SESSION_ID. Add hex agent disconnect CLI command.

tasks.name: Add /api/hex-agents/:id/disconnect route
tasks.description:
In hex-nexus/src/routes/orchestration.rs (or agents.rs), add:
```
POST /api/hex-agents/:id/disconnect
```
Handler: look up agent by id in state, set `status = "completed"`, `ended_at = Utc::now()`, persist. Return 200 with updated agent JSON. Return 404 if agent not found.
tasks.done_condition: POST /api/hex-agents/:id/disconnect returns 200 and updates agent status

tasks.name: Add hex agent disconnect CLI command
tasks.description:
In hex-cli/src/commands/agent.rs, add disconnect subcommand:
```
hex agent disconnect <session-id>
```
Calls POST /api/hex-agents/{session-id}/disconnect on nexus. Print confirmation: `⬡ agent {id} disconnected`.
tasks.done_condition: hex agent disconnect <id> calls the disconnect route and prints confirmation

tasks.name: Wire disconnect into session-end hook
tasks.description: In hex-cli/assets/helpers/hook-handler, find the session-end event handler. Add a call to `hex agent disconnect $CLAUDE_SESSION_ID` (or equivalent) after other session-end cleanup. This ensures agents are properly marked complete when Claude Code exits.
tasks.done_condition: hook-handler calls hex agent disconnect on session-end; agent status shows completed after session exits

successCriteria: hex inference add with bad model ID fails with clear error
hex agent disconnect marks agent as completed
Agents show status=completed after session ends
